name: cp-testcase-extension
description: Manage and run multiple competitive programming testcases from a sidebar.

commands.title: CP Testcases: Run All Test Cases

cpTestcases.cppCompiler.description: Compiler executable used to build C++ source files.

cpTestcases.cppCompilerArgs.description: Arguments passed to the C++ compiler before the source file. On Windows, CP Testcases also auto-adds a larger stack linker flag for GCC-like compilers unless you already provide one.

cpTestcases.cCompiler.description: Compiler executable used to build C source files.

cpTestcases.cCompilerArgs.description: Arguments passed to the C compiler before the source file. On Windows, CP Testcases also auto-adds a larger stack linker flag for GCC-like compilers unless you already provide one.

cpTestcases.pythonCommand.description: Python command used to run Python source files.

cpTestcases.javaCompiler.description: Java compiler command used to build Java source files.

cpTestcases.javaCompilerArgs.description: Arguments passed to javac before the source file.

cpTestcases.javaCommand.description: Java runtime command used to run compiled Java classes.

cpTestcases.sourceFile.description: Optional relative path to the root source file. Leave empty to autodetect from the active editor or workspace.

cpTestcases.defaultLanguage.description: Language used when CP Testcases creates a new problem source file automatically.

cpTestcases.onlineJudge.description: Marks this workspace as an online judge style setup, similar to the checkbox workflow in CPH.

cpTestcases.boilerplateCpp.description: Boilerplate used for new C++ problem files. Supported placeholders: {{problemName}}, {{className}}.

cpTestcases.boilerplateC.description: Boilerplate used for new C problem files. Supported placeholders: {{problemName}}, {{className}}.

cpTestcases.boilerplatePython.description: Boilerplate used for new Python problem files. Supported placeholders: {{problemName}}, {{className}}.

cpTestcases.boilerplateJava.description: Boilerplate used for new Java problem files. Supported placeholders: {{problemName}}, {{className}}.

cpTestcases.testcasesFolder.description: Folder where testcase data is stored.

cpTestcases.competitiveCompanionEnabled.description: Listen for Competitive Companion testcase imports on localhost.

cpTestcases.competitiveCompanionPort.description: Local port used for Competitive Companion imports.

cpTestcases.ignoreWhitespace.description: Treat outputs as equal when they only differ by whitespace.
